name: ZOMBETES
short_description: Face the undead apocalypse while managing your diabetes. ZOMBETES is a gripping text-based game where every choice is crucial to your survival. Navigate procedural levels, scavenge for insulin, food, and supplies, and fight to stay alive in this unique blend of survival and strategy.
detailed_description:
ZOMBETES is a zombie survival game where you play as a diabetic.


To survive, you must manage your blood glucose levels while avoiding infection. Navigate through procedurally generated levels in search of insulin and nutrition. Find items to barricade yourself, rest, and move on. 

Death is inevitable. The question is how long can you stay alive?

In your travels, you can encounter the remains of other ZOMBETES players whose lives have already expired. And when your time inevitably comes to an end, so too can other players find and loot your belongings.

You will also face NPC survivors who might come to your aid, or turn into adversaries.

In the fight for your life against the walking dead, there's no time to stop and smell the roses. Your blood sugar is dropping: eat the sandwich, inject the insulin, and find your next dose.

Features:

  • Non-linear game modes where each playthrough is unique

  • Linear narrative 'Story Mode'

  • Roguelite 'Perpetual Mode'

  • Asynchronous Multiplayer elements 

  • Original soundtrack composed by Meat Analogue, over 25 minutes in length

  • Immersive ASCII art display

  • Procedurally generated levels with:
    - 100+ areas to explore
    - 100+ interactive items (food, weapons, medicine)
    - Four NPC types (humans, zombies, animals, zombie animals)
    - 100+ lines of dialogue
